name: Clam Fritters
recipeInstructions:
Keywords: Fish, Main dish, Snacks, seafood Servings: 4
Drain the clams and chop them. Combine the dry ingredients in a bowl.
Combine the eggs, milk, onion, butter, and chopped clams in another bowl,
stirring until smooth. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture,
stirring until just combined. Drop spoonfuls of batter into hot shortening
(preheated to 350 degrees F) using a frying pan. Fry for 3 minutes, or until
golden brown. Drain on absorbent paper.
